item.title: A Time Travel Book for Noir Fiction Fans
item.description: This neo-noir time travel novel explores unprocessed grief and trauma through multiple storylines and reads like a thinky puzzle.

item.title: Read the Biggest Book Club’s February Selections, From Romance to Horror and Everything In Between
item.description: Here are the February picks from the biggest and most interesting book clubs out there, and they're all ones you can join online!

item.title: 26 Queer Books by Black Authors Out in 2026 to Preorder Now
item.description: Here are 26 of the most exciting new queer books by Black authors out in 2026, including historical fiction, romantasy, horror, and memoirs.

item.title: 5 Exciting Fantasy Novels by Black Authors for Your 2026 TBR
item.description: Get your 2026 TBR ready with these 5 great upcoming fantasy novels by Black authors!

item.title: One Year of the Trump Administration, and More Library Updates
item.description: Libraries across the U.S. reckon with the effects of one year of the Trump administration. Plus, censorship updates and more library news.
